Early Beta: lore and characters are still subject to change.

Dear Players, you've all given me the motivation to continue working on Asterna. Truly, thank you. .·°՞(≧□≦)՞°·. We reached 500k!!! I must confess, updates will come slow as I am working full time IRL, but my plan is to first split the lorebook into smaller entries to reduce token use, add encounter conditions to minimise random popup characters, and refine the existing locations so the AI stops making them up! After that, I will steadily add to the current formula. You can track my progress in the Asterna Log linked below. For those who have joined the club, please look forward to more visual novel style bots in the future! I will be making some smaller otomes, and my next project is just as ambitious as Asterna if not more! ↜₍^ .̀ ̫.́^₎ Sometimes I may drop an update notice as a bot, so look out!
